name: ChangeType()
author: Poki
description: Get ready for a puzzling challenge in ChangeType()! In this puzzle platforming game made by Nitrome, you'll have to make it to the end of each level. However, some levels seem impossible to beat! Luckily, your character has the ability to change the type of the blocks around you. By replacing spikes with normal blocks for example, you can safely pass dangerous parts of the level. Be careful though! You can only hold two different items at a time, so use your resources wisely. There's 30 different challenges to play - can you beat them all? How to play ChangeType()? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move! Use spacebar or Z to save and place items! Who created ChangeType()? ChangeType() is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Dangle How can I play ChangeType() for free? You can play ChangeType() for free on Poki. Can I play ChangeType() on mobile devices and desktop? ChangeType() can be played on your computer only.
